name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent invoicing leads to cash flow gaps.
